Dashboard.subtitle: Your event management and control center

profileAlert.title: Complete your profile
profileAlert.description: To take advantage of all features, complete your company and stand information.

points.1: Exhibitor badges will be delivered starting November 17 at 12:00 PM at the exhibitor registration module. Remember to bring an official ID.
points.2: No badge reprints are allowed, so it is important to keep your badge during the event days; otherwise, you will need to purchase an additional badge.
points.3: To expedite badge delivery, you must register your exhibitors and support staff in the "EXHIBITOR BADGES" section before October 30, 2026. After this date, registration can only be done on-site at the exhibitor assistance module on November 17, starting at 12:00 PM.

BuySessionSlots.securePaymentDesc: Your information is protected. Slots will be activated immediately after payment.
BuySessionSlots.purchaseError: Error processing payment. Please try again.

ScanLeadsUpsell.title: Capture Leads During the Event
ScanLeadsUpsell.subtitle: Scan visitor QR codes and collect valuable information from prospects who visit your booth. Increase your event ROI with professional follow-up.
ScanLeadsUpsell.featuresTitle: Everything you need to capture leads
ScanLeadsUpsell.featuresSubtitle: Professional tools to maximize your event investment

qr.title: Instant QR Scanning
qr.description: Scan visitor badges in seconds. Capture complete prospect information without manual forms.

contacts.title: Contact Database
contacts.description: Access name, company, position, email and more. All visitor information in one place.

analytics.title: Reports & Metrics
analytics.description: Visualize how many leads you captured, by day, hour. Measure your participation success.

export.title: Export to Excel
export.description: Download all your leads in Excel format to import into your CRM or marketing tools.

instant.title: Real-Time Data
instant.description: Leads are saved automatically and are instantly available for consultation or export.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Your data is protected with encryption. Only you have access to the leads you capture.

ScanLeadsUpsell.benefitsTitle: Why do you need the Scan Leads module?
benefits: Save time: No more lost business cards or handwritten data
Increase conversions: Follow up immediately while interest is hot
Measure results: Know how many prospects actually visited your booth
Competitive advantage: While others take notes, you already have digitized data
Proven ROI: Recover your investment with just 1-2 new clients from the event
Professionalism: Impress visitors with modern capture technology

cta.title: Start Capturing Leads Today
cta.subtitle: Join hundreds of exhibitors who are already maximizing their event ROI with our lead capture system.

footer.note: Have questions? Contact your sales advisor for more information about the Scan Leads module.

messages.manage_documents: Manage the upload, review, and approval of documents according to the contracted stand type.
messages.mounting_letter_admin_info: Mounting letter upload is enabled only when all required documents are approved.
messages.mounting_letter_formats: Allowed formats: PDF and DOCX. Maximum size: {maxSize} MB.
messages.no_mounting_letter: The mounting letter has not been issued yet.
messages.available_when_review_complete: Available when the admin review is complete.
messages.authorized_documents_available: Your documentation has been approved. The mounting letter is now available for review and download.
messages.stand_change_confirm: Changing the stand type will remove {count} document(s) that no longer apply:
messages.document_uploaded_success: File uploaded successfully. Status updated to In review.
messages.reject_comment_required: To reject, you must add a comment.
messages.must_upload_file: You must upload at least one file to send.
messages.submit_success: Submission recorded. The file is now under review.
messages.mounting_letter_unavailable: You cannot upload the mounting letter until all required documents are approved.
messages.mounting_letter_confirm: Confirm that you have reviewed the exhibitor's required documents and that all documents meet the requirements to approve the mounting.
messages.mounting_letter_delete_confirm: Confirm that you want to delete the mounting letter.
messages.delete_authorized_confirm: The document is already authorized. Do you confirm that you want to delete it?
messages.file_duplicated: This file has already been uploaded in another document. Avoid accidental duplicates.
messages.exhibitor_selection: Select an exhibitor to review their file and validate their documents.
messages.drag_drop_instruction: Drag and drop your file here or use the selection buttons.
messages.design_question: Did you send the renders and design files for your stand to damian.arias@igeco.mx and daniela.torres@igeco.mx?
messages.comment_placeholder: Example: Please upload the document signed by the legal representative.
messages.comment_required: If the status is Rejected, the comment is mandatory.
messages.confirm_send_review: Review the summary before submitting the exhibitor's documentation.
messages.partial_send_warning: You are about to submit your documentation partially. Some required documents are still pending upload and must be completed later.

errors.invalid_format: Invalid file format. Only PDF or DOCX files are allowed.
errors.file_too_large: The file exceeds the maximum allowed size of ${MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB} MB.
errors.cannot_load_list: Could not load the exhibitors list
errors.file_duplicated: This file has already been uploaded to another document. Avoid accidental duplicates.
errors.authorized_confirmed: This document is already authorized. Replacing it will return it to Under review. Do you want to continue?

exhibitor_manual.title: Exhibitor manual signed by the legal representative
exhibitor_manual.description: Document signed by the legal representative of the exhibiting company.

free_space_approval.description: Official format to validate the design of the free space stand.

stand_render.title: Stand render with dimensions
stand_render.description: Render with measurements of height, width and depth.

comfort_plus_design.title: Mandatory design
comfort_plus_design.description: Send the stand design files to damian.arias@igeco.mx and daniela.torres@igeco.mx. Include renders and visual material.

comfort_plus_format.title: Stand Comfort Plus format
comfort_plus_format.description: Official Stand Comfort Plus format with designs and specifications.

machinery_exhibition.title: Machinery exhibition format
machinery_exhibition.description: Optional document to report machinery exhibition.

activity_registry.title: Activity registry format
activity_registry.description: Optional document for additional stand activities.
